description: This Java class AuthService provides authentication-related functionalities such as user registration, email verification, login verification, and audit logging in a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: AuthService
classes.description: Service class providing authentication functionalities including user registration, email verification, login validation, and audit logging.

methods.name: registerUser
methods.description: Registers a new user, saves user data, and triggers email verification token sending.

methods.name: sendOrResendVerification
methods.description: Invalidates old email verification tokens and creates a new token, and logs the email action.

methods.name: verifyToken
methods.description: Verifies the email verification token, activates the user if valid, and updates logs.

methods.name: canLogin
methods.description: Checks user credentials and email verification status, logs login attempts.

methods.name: getUserByEmail
methods.description: Retrieves a user entity based on email address.
